'''gashufu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:nociplasticity|nociplasticity]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| g-sh-f
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:nociplasticity|nociplasticity]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| gashufu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:gæshifith|gæshifith]] || [[word:gæshifij|gæshifij]] || [[word:gæshifish|gæshifish]] || [[word:gæshifi|gæshifi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:gashushufuth|gashushufuth]] || [[word:gashushufuj|gashushufuj]] || [[word:gashushufush|gashushufush]] || [[word:gashushufu|gashushufu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:gashufuth|gashufuth]] || [[word:gashufuj|gashufuj]] || [[word:gashufush|gashufush]] || [[word:gashufu|gashufu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:gashuffuth|gashuffuth]] || [[word:gashuffuj|gashuffuj]] || [[word:gashuffush|gashuffush]] || [[word:gashuffuf|gashuffuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:gashufuthu|gashufuthu]] || [[word:gashufuju|gashufuju]] || [[word:gashufushu|gashufushu]] || [[word:gashufuku|gashufuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:gashufuth|gashufuth]] || [[word:gashufuj|gashufuj]] || [[word:gashufush|gashufush]] || [[word:gashufu|gashufu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:gashufuthul|gashufuthul]] || [[word:gashufujul|gashufujul]] || [[word:gashufushul|gashufushul]] || [[word:gashufukul|gashufukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:gashufuthuthu|gashufuthuthu]] || [[word:gashufujuju|gashufujuju]] || [[word:gashufushushu|gashufushushu]] || [[word:gashufuku|gashufuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:gashufuthun|gashufuthun]] || [[word:gashufujun|gashufujun]] || [[word:gashufushun|gashufushun]] || [[word:gashufukun|gashufukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:gashufuthuoro|gashufuthuoro]] || [[word:gashufujuoro|gashufujuoro]] || [[word:gashufushuoro|gashufushuoro]] || [[word:gashufukuoro|gashufukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d03cc2d}}
